title: Independent judicial review board
description: Establish an independent review board to evaluate judicial appointments based on transparent merit criteria.

updates.description: Draft legislation submitted to parliament; committee review scheduled.

title: Universal primary care access
description: Guarantee primary care access for every citizen by expanding rural clinic coverage and tele-medicine reach.

updates.description: Twelve new rural clinics opened; tele-medicine rollout reaches 60% of target districts.

title: Universal pre-school enrollment
description: Ensure free pre-school enrollment is available to every child aged three to five by the end of the current term.

title: National broadband expansion
description: Roll out gigabit fiber to 95% of households and full 5G coverage to every municipality.

updates.description: Fiber rollout three months behind schedule; revised milestones published.

title: 40% renewable generation by 2027
description: Reach 40% of national electricity generation from renewable sources, with new solar and offshore wind capacity.

updates.description: National grid passes 40% renewable threshold one quarter ahead of schedule.
